title: helichrysum molestum
intro: Helichrysum molestum, also known as the Golden Everlasting, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern region of Western Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Helichrysum molestum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, ease respiratory problems, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum molestum can be found in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and dried flowers, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
